name: MindFlow
description: Personal knowledge graph. Indexes email, iMessage, and documents into a searchable knowledge base with entity extraction and attention detection.

port.description: Port for the MindFlow HTTP server (default: 3456)

autoStart.description: Auto-start server on first tool call (default: true)

dataDir.label: Data Directory
dataDir.help: Where MindFlow stores its database, logs, and configuration

autoStart.label: Auto-Start Server
autoStart.help: Automatically start the MindFlow server when a tool is called
